productDisplayName: Nike Men The Overplay VI Black Sports Shoes
description: Bag that hoop with this pair of nike Overplay VI shoes. Designed for Basketball lovers, this shoe adds an urban flair to the classic sport.UpperSynthetic leather upper with mesh fabric and synthetic overlays for a snug FitPerforations on the forefoot area and towards the heel cup for enhanced breathabilitySynthetic nike swoosh on both sides of the midfootPadded synthetic leather tongue and collar that has fabric lining for snug comfortLace up system for a snug, customised fitMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleSolid rubber outsole with herringbone pattern for maximum traction and optimal performanceTPU shank in the midfoot for enhanced stability and ergonomic comfort to the inner archWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dirtDo not store under direct sunlight
